name: Thistle Ring
description: "You have been wronged. You have been curdled. They must hurt for it." - Prayer of Agony

name: Ring of Broken Promises
description: "We are mother to the plague and child to it. We eat our young. We eat our old." - Elegy of the Empty

name: Snake Ring
description: "Eat the moving. Feast upon the still. All is hunger." - Prayer of Appetite

name: Rune Ring
description: "The Sayer speaks for us. So we cloak ourselves in silence." - Elegy of the None

name: Plagued Ring
description: "Feel unwell. Feel nothing. Feel this blessing of decay." - Prayer of Sickness

name: Crow Ring
description: "All things fester. Flesh to fluid. Bone to dust. You to this. To us." - Prayer of Rot

name: Scarlet Ring
description: "They want what you have. They are what you want. Take." -  Prayer of Betrayal

name: Battlecry Ring
description: "Let their screams be our battle cry. Let their whimpers be our last words." - Elegy of the Unspoken

name: Ring of Determination
description: "The Born God knew you in the beforelife, as he will again in the afterlife. Are you worth knowing?" -  Litany of Fealty

name: Serendipity Ring
description: "We grow, we build, we search, we pass. But only with all four do we live." - Hymn of Four

name: Solace Ring
description: "Look away, oh Forsaken, I am not ready." - Hymn of Loss

name: Silver Ring
description: "A name is a weakness. A voice is a vice. We have neither." - Elegy of the Hushed

name: Band of Calmness
description: "The eternal gods know only the world as it was, the Born God sees the world as it could be." - Litany of Hope

name: Woven Ring
description: "Thread your fingers through my own, oh Maker, and shape the clay of my becoming." - Hymn of Form

name: Willow Cap Ring
description: "Place your lips to the earth, oh Mother, and breathe warmth into my harvest." - Hymn of Growth

name: Feather Ring
description: "Part the branches and steady the wind, oh Seeker, so that I may take flight." - Hymn of Freedom

name: Fierce Ring
description: "The Born God sees through our eyes, acts through our hands. He is countless, he is legion." - Litany of Union

name: Golden Band
description: "Our god is the Born God. Not the first god, but the last. Not the question, but the answer." - Litany of Origin

name: Agility Ring
description: "Our final death is a debt owed. Each small death is a payment toward it." - Elegy of the Silent

name: Stone Tusk Ring
description: "All practice our faith, even if they do not know its name. There are no infidels, only heretics." - Litany of Embrace

name: Jade Ring
description: "The Born God subsumed the kingdom of gods, now our duty is to subsume the kingdom of men." - Litany of Duty
